title: Melanie Martin on a $2.3 Million ROI PR Campaign
summary: The single most-listened episode of the show. Melanie Martin walks through a public relations campaign that returned $2.3 million in measurable ROI — and what most companies still get wrong about earned media.
full_content_text: The single most-listened episode of the show. Melanie Martin walks through a public relations campaign that returned $2.3 million in measurable ROI — and what most companies still get wrong about earned media.
